title: Lay's 72 Hour Challenge
summary: Lay's 72 hour freshness challenge: Super Bowl LX

body.text: During Super Bowl LX, Lay’s launched the 72-Hour Challenge, inviting fans to experience the brand’s freshness promise in real time. Viewers who scanned the on-screen QR code during the commercial had the chance to claim one of the first 100,000 bags of chips, delivered directly from the farm to their doorstep in 72 hours or less. If a bag did not arrive on time, Lay’s promised to send a full year’s supply. TikTok Creative Lab worked closely with Lay’s marketing leadership ahead of game day to guide the campaign strategy, QR code experience, and content approach to ensure it was optimized for maximum real-time engagement and TikTok-native storytelling. This created a seamless second-screen experience as fans moved instantly from watching the game on TV to claiming their bag and tracking its journey on their phones.

Key TikTok creators played a vital role in the campaign’s success by authentically documenting the entire 72-hour journey. Creators such as @brunchwithbabs, @tomwashere, and @olivia.veliz posted high-energy unboxing videos, countdowns, and farm-to-door recaps that resonated strongly with audiences. Their real-time content sparked massive organic conversations, duets, and user-generated posts using #Lays72HourChallenge, turning a one-time Super Bowl moment into an extended cultural conversation that continued well beyond the game.
